description_long: This is a compact, semi-automatic handgun with a metallic slide and frame, featuring a dark, polished finish. The grip panels are a deep reddish-brown, likely made of wood or a synthetic material, and are contoured for ergonomic handling, with a visible emblem embedded on each side. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, providing ample space for finger placement. The slide has subtle serrations at the rear for improved grip during operation, and there are visible markings and engravings on the slide and frame. The barrel is short and flush with the slide, with no visible threading or compensator. The overall design is sleek and utilitarian, suitable for concealed carry or law enforcement use.
description: A compact, metallic semi-automatic handgun with a dark slide, contoured reddish-brown grip panels, and detailed engravings. The design is sleek and ergonomic, with a robust trigger guard and subtle slide serrations.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the contoured grip, slide serrations, and visible engravings on the slide and frame.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the width of the grip and the alignment of the slide and frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other grip panel, slide serrations, and the overall compactness of the handgun.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the muzzle, barrel opening, and the rounded trigger guard.
attribute_grip_design: The grip features a deep reddish-brown color with a polished, semi-gloss finish, contoured for ergonomic comfort. It has a subtle checkered or textured pattern for improved handling, and an embedded circular emblem or logo is visible on each side. The grip panels are slightly curved to fit the palm, with no pronounced finger grooves but a gentle taper at the base for secure retention.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement. It has a smooth, continuous curve with no undercuts or squared-off edges, and lacks any visible texturing or reinforcement. The design is classic and functional, prioritizing comfort and accessibility.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and flush with the slide, exhibiting a standard profile with no threading, porting, or compensator. The exterior is finished in a matching metallic tone, and there are no visible external features or markings on the barrel itself.
attribute_slide_markings: Visible markings on the slide include a serial number or model designation engraved on the left side, along with subtle manufacturer or proof marks. The engravings are small, precise, and located just above the trigger area, with additional fine text or symbols near the rear serrations.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and slightly beveled, with a smooth finish and no finger rest or flaring. It appears flush with the bottom of the grip, maintaining the compact profile of the handgun, and may feature a small circular emblem or logo matching the grip design.
